message:
fix(build): Use wasm-opt library directly instead of subprocess

The wasm-opt step was failing with FileNotFound because it tried
to run edgebox-wasm-opt as a subprocess, but zig-out/bin wasn't
in PATH during CI benchmark runs.

Fix: Call wasm_opt.optimize() directly from runtime.zig instead
of spawning a subprocess. This uses the Binaryen C library that's
already linked into edgeboxc.
